---
name: Design Enhancement
about: Suggest a design or CSS improvement
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: 'design, enhancement, css'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the design enhancement.

## Current State
How it currently looks/behaves.

## Proposed Design
How it should look/behave.

## Design References
- Screenshots
- Mockups
- Inspiration links

## Implementation Notes
Technical details or CSS changes needed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Design matches mockup/description
- [ ] Responsive on mobile, tablet, desktop
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG compliant)
- [ ] Dark mode support (if applicable)
- [ ] Smooth animations/transitions
